## Download

Use the GitHub release page for the current beta artifacts:

- Windows beta builds: NSIS `.exe` installer when published
- macOS legacy/original builds: `.dmg` where available

> The `.zip`, `.blockmap`, and `.yml` files are usually auto-update artifacts. Most users should download the primary installer for their platform.

## Requirements

- [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code) installed and authenticated

## Release Notes Guidance

Call out platform status plainly:
- whether the release is Windows beta, macOS-first, or dual-platform
- known Windows limitations, if any
- whether code signing is configured for Windows
- whether the release has been smoke-tested on real Windows hardware
